reason: Strong institutional and global adoption, alongside significant capital inflows into crypto-adjacent sectors, signals a robust demand environment. Wall Street's increasing recognition of Bitcoin's role in the new financial cycle, despite potential AI rotation, supports continued upward momentum. The inherent volatility of the asset class warrants a higher risk assessment.
